chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1296 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 15-10-2025 Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation is received. This is a date-by-Court matter, and it was adjourned for today in presence of the Counsel for the Petitioner. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
